name: History
description: Generate deterministic repository history, ownership, hotspots, co-change, and drift artifacts.

outputs.name: Repository History
outputs.description: Deterministic repository temporal intelligence derived from Git history and Software Graph nodes.

schema.description: Deterministic repository temporal intelligence derived from Git history and Software Graph nodes.

outputs.name: Repository Ownership
outputs.description: Deterministic ownership artifact derived from Git history.

schema.description: Deterministic ownership artifact derived from Git history.

outputs.name: Repository Hotspots
outputs.description: Deterministic hotspot artifact derived from Git churn and modification frequency.

schema.description: Deterministic hotspot artifact derived from Git churn and modification frequency.

outputs.name: Repository Co-changes
outputs.description: Deterministic co-change relationships derived from Git commits.

schema.description: Deterministic co-change relationships derived from Git commits.

outputs.name: Architectural Drift
outputs.description: Deterministic feature drift artifact derived from temporal file and coupling evidence.

schema.description: Deterministic feature drift artifact derived from temporal file and coupling evidence.
